summary: Iteration 6: Tested multi-donataria features. All 14 backend tests passed. All frontend components verified working including org selector, org switching, new org creation dialog, and dashboard data isolation per org.

issues: Minor: Recharts console warning about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

passed_tests: GET /api/auth/me returns organizaciones_ids array
GET /api/organizaciones returns list of user's organizations with active flag
POST /api/organizaciones creates new org and switches user to it
PUT /api/organizaciones/switch/{org_id} switches active organization
PUT /api/organizaciones/switch/{fake_id} returns 403 for unauthorized org
Exactly one org marked as active in organizaciones list
Creating org adds it to user's organizaciones_ids
Org creation logged in audit (entidad=organizacion, accion=crear)
GET /api/reportes/{id}/pdf returns valid PDF
POST /api/organizacion/logo uploads and stores logo as base64
GET /api/auditoria supports pagination (limit/skip)
GET /api/auditoria supports entidad and accion filters
GET /api/auditoria/export returns CSV with correct headers
Sidebar shows organization selector with org name and RFC
Org selector dropdown shows all user organizations with checkmark for active one
Org selector has 'Nueva Organización' option that navigates to Configuración
Configuration page has 'Multi-Donataria' card with 'Crear Nueva Organización' button
New org dialog has name/RFC fields and creates organization on submit
After switching org, dashboard shows data for the new org (verified: $0 -> $180,000)
Report dropdown has 'Descargar PDF' option
Audit log page shows entries with filters and pagination
Logo upload card present in configuration page
All sidebar nav links work: Dashboard, Donantes, Donativos, CFDIs, Calendario Fiscal, Transparencia, Alertas AML, Reportes, Workflows, Cumplimiento, Auditoría, Configuración
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed organizations during testing to verify multi-org functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 tested multi-donataria features. User test@donataria.org now has multiple organizations including 'Fundación Test A.C.' (original with data) and several TEST_ prefixed orgs created during testing. The org selector in sidebar works correctly - clicking an org switches the active org and reloads dashboard with that org's data. Creating a new org via Configuración page auto-switches to it. All audit log entries track org creation. Previous features (PDF download, logo upload, audit log) continue to work.

mocked_apis.CFDI_PAC_Integration: CFDI timbrado (stamping) is MOCKED - returns simulated UUID
mocked_apis.Email_Notifications: Email notifications MOCKED - RESEND_API_KEY not configured

multi_donataria.sidebar_org_selector: Shows current org name/RFC, dropdown with all orgs, checkmark for active
multi_donataria.new_org_option: 'Nueva Organización' in dropdown navigates to Configuración
multi_donataria.new_org_dialog: Dialog with name/RFC fields, creates org and auto-switches
multi_donataria.dashboard_data_isolation: Switching org shows different data (verified $0 vs $180,000)

logo_upload.config_card: 'Logo de la Organización' card with upload button
